title: How do I set the first column to a unique Item ID?
excerpt: I’m looking to set the first column to a unique item ID, but there doesn’t seem to be that option. I can make any other column a unique item ID except the first–but the first is where it’s the most important, right? Can …

posts.author: ike5 (Ike)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m looking to set the first column to a unique item ID, but there doesn’t seem to be that option. I can make any other column a unique item ID except the first–but the first is where it’s the most important, right? Can someone point me in the right direction?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @ike5

This can be done with this app https://monday.com/marketplace/17. Below is the recipe for it.

image1753×258 23.2 KB

It overwrite the leftmost column with the generated ID when a new item is created.

image764×361 19.8 KB

More info about fields that can be used (year, quarter, month etc) can be found here
